def negative_django_queryset_count_then_exists():
    rule_id = "django_queryset_count_then_exists"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Django querysets use count() for existence checks instead of exists()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
